narrative:
Precinct Washington Twp (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 418 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
